name: The Isle of Tiree in VR

reviews.review_description: A great way to explore the beauty of Tiree, fully immersed with stunning menus

This is a really well thought out and designed app… an experience from a holiday I assume, has everything it needs to have, easy to navigate, interesting videos from what looks like an 
interesting place… the beaches here in NZ, I love the sea, I love visiting in winter (which this def has that vibe)….. it’s a free app as well !  Easy 5 star rating ! Thankyou for doing this 😀 plus I met my G/f (hope one day to be wife), on a ferry just like this on our Cook Straight…. Watching yr ferry vid took me straight there !
